special.description: Free upgrade to LUXURY BURJ VIEW ROOM
Free upgrade to LUXURY BURJ VIEW ROOM
Free upgrade to LUXURY BURJ VIEW ROOM

rateBasis.tariffNotes:
Rate Notes:
Hotel Tariff Notes: Compulsory Tourism Dirham to be paid by guest directly to the hotel per room per night valid from 31st March 2014 Onward. No show and early departure will be subjected to 100% charge.No date,name and room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, no separate bed for children is provided unless otherwise stated. Early check in and late check-out will be charged at 100% of the applicable room rate, and has to be requested in advance. Early Departure of the Guest(s) will subject to Full length of stay booked will be charged.
Check-in for Taj club rooms & Suites will be done at the main reception at the lobby. Existing reservation cannot be cancelled and rebooked under lower promotion. Half board supplement cannot be applied on 31 DEC and 1 JAN
*NOTE: Hotels' Restaurant Treehouse, Tesoro and Miss Tes are closed and breakfast is served in the Opera ballroom during this time. (22/05/2023-30/09/2023) Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking. The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.

Rate Notes:
Hotel Tariff Notes: Compulsory Tourism Dirham to be paid by guest directly to the hotel per room per night valid from 31st March 2014 Onward. No show and early departure will be subjected to 100% charge.No date,name and room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, no separate bed for children is provided unless otherwise stated. Early check in and late check-out will be charged at 100% of the applicable room rate, and has to be requested in advance. Early Departure of the Guest(s) will subject to Full length of stay booked will be charged.
Check-in for Taj club rooms & Suites will be done at the main reception at the lobby. Existing reservation cannot be cancelled and rebooked under lower promotion. Half board supplement cannot be applied on 31 DEC and 1 JAN
*NOTE: Hotels' Restaurant Treehouse, Tesoro and Miss Tes are closed and breakfast is served in the Opera ballroom during this time. (22/05/2023-30/09/2023) Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking. The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.

Rate Notes:
Hotel Tariff Notes: Compulsory Tourism Dirham to be paid by guest directly to the hotel per room per night valid from 31st March 2014 Onward. No show and early departure will be subjected to 100% charge.No date,name and room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, no separate bed for children is provided unless otherwise stated. Early check in and late check-out will be charged at 100% of the applicable room rate, and has to be requested in advance. Early Departure of the Guest(s) will subject to Full length of stay booked will be charged.
Check-in for Taj club rooms & Suites will be done at the main reception at the lobby. Existing reservation cannot be cancelled and rebooked under lower promotion. Half board supplement cannot be applied on 31 DEC and 1 JAN
*NOTE: Hotels' Restaurant Treehouse, Tesoro and Miss Tes are closed and breakfast is served in the Opera ballroom during this time. (22/05/2023-30/09/2023) Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking. The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.
Accommodation on room only basis.Inclusive of standard Wi-Fi. Complimentary shuttle to Dubai mall at fixed timings.-. NON-REFUNDABLE RATE
Inclusive of buffet breakfast at a designated dining venue.Inclusive of standard Wi-Fi. Complimentary shuttle to Dubai mall at fixed timings.-. NON-REFUNDABLE RATE
Accommodation on room only basis.Inclusive of standard Wi-Fi. Complimentary shuttle to Dubai mall at fixed timings.-. NON-REFUNDABLE RATE

NON-REFUNDABLE RATE Fees payable at the property will be collected in local currency. If shown in non-local currency on your booking confirmation the listed amount is based on current exchange rates, which may vary at the time of travel.
Inclusive of buffet breakfast at a designated dining venue.Inclusive of standard Wi-Fi. Complimentary shuttle to Dubai mall at fixed timings.-. NON-REFUNDABLE RATE
Accommodation on room only basis.Inclusive of standard Wi-Fi. Complimentary shuttle to Dubai mall at fixed timings.-. NON-REFUNDABLE RATE

roomType.name: LUXURY, DOUBLE OR TWIN BED, CITY VIEW

rateBasis.tariffNotes: IF YOU FAIL TO CHECK-IN FOR THIS RESERVATION, OR IF YOU CANCEL OR CHANGE THIS RESERVATION AFTER CXL DEADLINE, YOU MAY INCUR PENALTY CHARGES AT THE DISCRETION OF THE HOTEL OF UP TO 100% OF THE BOOKING VALUE, UNLESS OTHERWISE STATED.It includes: Room Only<BR />CXL charges apply as follows: STARTING 03/05/2026 CXL-PENALTY FEE IS 100.00% OF BOOKING PRICE. IF YOU FAIL TO CHECK-IN FOR THIS RESERVATION, OR IF YOU CANCEL OR CHANGE THIS RESERVATION AFTER CXL DEADLINE, YOU MAY INCUR PENALTY CHARGES AT THE DISCRETION OF THE HOTEL OF UP TO 100% OF THE BOOKING VALUE, UNLESS OTHERWISE STATED.It includes: Bed and Breakfast<BR />CXL charges apply as follows: STARTING 03/05/2026 CXL-PENALTY FEE IS 100.00% OF BOOKING PRICE. NON-REFUNDABLE RATE
